positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a bioluminescent rainforest scene viewed from above. The composition is highly symmetric and central, featuring large, stylized tropical leaves with glowing neon vein details, surrounded by exotic, gently glowing mushrooms and crystalline flora. The main subject is a pair of elegant, mythical jungle creatures (like a stylized, serene macaw and a playful jaguar cub) interacting seamlessly within the dense foliage. Use a high-contrast, Art Nouveau inspired aesthetic with striking silhouettes and vibrant jewel-toned colors (deep emerald, electric teal, luminous violet, and gold accents). The style should mimic vector art combined with detailed watercolor washes, suitable for DTG printing on fabric. Focus on clean edges, strong outlines, and excellent separation of light and shadow.
